calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearances:
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Wael Naber Ind and dba Quality Cleaners.
Principal $51,340.08
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $259.50
Interest of $1,899.45
For the total of $55,999.03
It is further ordered and adjudged that upon sale of the repossessed leased equipment by plaintiff, Trinity Capital Corp., defendants shall receive all credits to which they are entitled by law.
Judgment signed in open court.
